sensitivity.note: All scenarios use the same methodology and countries where data is available; only the start year changes.

healthyLifeYearsMetric.note: Complete country-year HALE coverage is not available in this in-repo panel.

incomeGrowthMetric.metricUsed: Real GDP per capita YoY growth (proxy)
incomeGrowthMetric.note: Complete country-year real after-tax median income coverage is not available in this in-repo panel.
